title: Air Fryer Liners Rectangle 20 x 14cm – Disposable Greaseproof Paper Sheets for Airfryer – Non-Stick Fryer Accessories for Easy Cooking & Cleaning, 60 Pack
features: MESS-FREE COOKING – Keep your air fryer basket clean with these air fryer liners, designed to catch grease, crumbs, and food residue. No more scrubbing baked-on oil after every meal, saving time and effort. Perfect for anyone who wants hassle-free kitchen clean-up

PERFECTLY SIZED FIT – Each liner measures 20 x 14cm, shaped to suit a wide range of popular rectangular air fryer models. Whether you’re preparing chips, chicken, or pastries, the fit ensures reliable coverage and prevents food sticking to your fryer

DURABLE GREASEPROOF PAPER – Made from quality greaseproof paper, these liners are heat-resistant, sturdy, and safe for everyday cooking. They prevent sticking without tearing or breaking down easily, offering a practical solution for home chefs

VERSATILE FRYER ACCESSORY – Not just for frying: use these air fryer paper liners when reheating leftovers, baking small pastries, or roasting vegetables. A reliable air fryer accessory that supports multiple cooking styles while reducing the need for added oils

VALUE 60-PACK SUPPLY – Each pack includes 60 disposable airfryer liners, giving you long-lasting convenience at an affordable price. Stock up for weeks of quick and easy meals, knowing you have a hygienic, ready-to-use solution at hand
description: Simplify your cooking routine with these air fryer liners, designed to keep your fryer basket spotless and food tasting great. Each liner is cut to a 20 x 14cm rectangle, the ideal size for a wide range of air fryers, making them a practical addition to any kitchen. Crafted from greaseproof paper, they provide a non-stick layer that prevents food residue from clinging to your fryer, while also reducing the need for heavy cleaning afterwards. Whether you’re making crispy chips, succulent chicken, roasted vegetables, or sweet treats, these air fryer paper liners help achieve delicious results without extra mess. Supplied in a convenient 60-pack, they’re a cost-effective solution for busy households that value both taste and convenience. Perfect as everyday air fryer accessories, these disposable sheets make cooking simpler, cleaner, and more enjoyable.
